subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and at the Threshold of His Oneness did I raise my voice in supplication and lamentation, that the means of comfort [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و بدرگاه احدیت عجز و زاری گردید که اسباب راحت و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @poems and quotation from poetry, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for prosperity
